apis.name: Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS)
apis.free_tier: 500 queries/day with API key, 25/day without. No credit card required.
apis.data_provided: Employment statistics, occupational employment, wages, CPI, unemployment rates, JOLTS data, industry employment projections
apis.notes: Core data source. Weekly refresh enabled. Provides JOLTS series via FRED bridge.

apis.name: USAJobs
apis.free_tier: Fully free with API key registration. No rate limit published but fair use applies.
apis.data_provided: Federal job postings, agency hiring data, GS pay scales, clearance requirements, location-based federal opportunities
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. Requires User-Agent header and API key.

apis.name: Adzuna
apis.free_tier: Free tier: 250 requests/month. No credit card required for registration.
apis.data_provided: Job listings across 16 countries, salary estimates, job market trends, historical data, category breakdowns
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. Covers US, UK, AU, CA, DE, FR, and more.

apis.name: RemoteOK
apis.free_tier: Fully free public JSON API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Remote job listings, company names, tags, salary ranges, location requirements
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. Simple JSON endpoint, no auth needed.

apis.name: Jooble
apis.free_tier: Free API access with registration. Rate limits apply per partner agreement.
apis.data_provided: Aggregated job listings from 70+ countries, job counts by keyword and location
apis.notes: Already integrated. Good for international job market coverage.

apis.name: The Muse
apis.free_tier: Free public API. No authentication required for basic endpoints.
apis.data_provided: Company profiles, job listings, company culture info, office photos, employee reviews
apis.notes: Good for employer branding data. Returns company culture, benefits, and job listings. Useful for competitive intel tool.

apis.name: Arbeitnow
apis.free_tier: Free public JSON feed. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: European job listings, remote jobs, visa-sponsorship jobs, salary ranges
apis.notes: Niche European focus. Useful for international recruitment. Simple JSON endpoint.

apis.name: Reed.co.uk
apis.free_tier: Free API access with registration. Basic auth with API key.
apis.data_provided: UK job listings, salary data, employer information, job details
apis.notes: UK-specific. Good for clients with UK hiring needs.

apis.name: Jobicy
apis.free_tier: Free public RSS/JSON API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Remote job listings, salary ranges, company info, job categories
apis.notes: Remote-first job board. Simple API, good supplement to RemoteOK.

apis.name: Landing.jobs
apis.free_tier: Free API with registration. Developer-focused.
apis.data_provided: European tech job listings, salary transparency data, relocation support info
apis.notes: European tech jobs with relocation data. Niche but useful for international tech hiring.

apis.name: Himalayas (GitHub Jobs replacement)
apis.free_tier: Free public API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Remote tech job listings, company profiles, salary data, tech stack requirements
apis.notes: GitHub Jobs was deprecated. Himalayas is a strong replacement for tech/remote job data.

apis.name: Findwork.dev
apis.free_tier: Free tier: 50 requests/day. API key required.
apis.data_provided: Software engineering job listings aggregated from multiple sources, tech stack tags
apis.notes: Developer-focused aggregator. Good for tech role competitive analysis.

apis.name: O*NET Web Services
apis.free_tier: Free with registration. Rate limited to fair use.
apis.data_provided: Occupational data, skills, knowledge, abilities, wage estimates, job outlook, education requirements, related occupations
apis.notes: Integrated in S18 (v2.0). Core source for skills and occupational data. 1,000+ occupations.

apis.name: CareerOneStop
apis.free_tier: Free with registration. US DOL sponsored. Token-based auth.
apis.data_provided: Salary data, occupation profiles, certifications, training programs, employer listings, job outlook
apis.notes: Integrated in S18 (v2). Complements O*NET with training and certification data.

apis.name: Open Payments (CMS)
apis.free_tier: Fully free government API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Healthcare industry payment data, physician compensation from pharma/device companies
apis.notes: Niche healthcare compensation data. Useful for healthcare recruiting vertical.

apis.name: Glassdoor (via Tavily/Firecrawl)
apis.free_tier: Official API deprecated in 2023. Accessible via existing Tavily/Firecrawl integrations.
apis.data_provided: Company reviews, salary reports, interview questions, CEO approval ratings
apis.notes: Official API no longer available. Can get data via Tavily web search or Firecrawl scraping. Consider compliance implications.

apis.name: Levels.fyi (via Firecrawl)
apis.free_tier: No official API. Data accessible via Tavily/Firecrawl.
apis.data_provided: Tech industry compensation data, total comp breakdowns (base/stock/bonus), company comparisons
apis.notes: No official API. Best tech salary data available. Consider Firecrawl integration for key data points.

apis.name: PayScale (via Tavily)
apis.free_tier: No free API. Data accessible via Tavily web search integration.
apis.data_provided: Salary benchmarks, cost of living adjustments, compensation trends, job market reports
apis.notes: No direct API. Leverage existing Tavily integration to pull PayScale salary data on demand.

apis.name: Salary.com (via Tavily)
apis.free_tier: No free API. Data accessible via Tavily web search integration.
apis.data_provided: Salary ranges by role/location, benefits data, compensation planning tools
apis.notes: No direct API. Can pull data via Tavily for specific salary queries.

apis.name: O*NET (Skills/Knowledge)
apis.free_tier: Same as occupational data -- free with registration.
apis.data_provided: Skills taxonomy, knowledge areas, abilities, work activities, technology skills, emerging occupations
apis.notes: Skills data already integrated via O*NET v2.0. Covers 35 skills, 33 knowledge areas, 52 abilities.

apis.name: ESCO (European Skills/Competences)
apis.free_tier: Fully free EU API. REST + SPARQL endpoints. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: 13,890 skills, 3,008 occupations, skills-to-occupation mappings, multilingual (27 languages), qualification frameworks
apis.notes: European equivalent of O*NET. Excellent for international skills taxonomy. Free, well-documented REST API. High value for multinational clients.

apis.name: Open Skills API (DataAtWork)
apis.free_tier: Fully free open-source API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Skills normalization, job title normalization, skills-to-jobs mappings, autocomplete
apis.notes: Built on O*NET data but provides useful normalization and mapping APIs. May have uptime issues -- verify before integrating.

apis.name: Coursera Catalog API
apis.free_tier: Free affiliate API with application. No credit card required.
apis.data_provided: Course catalog, specializations, professional certificates, skills covered, partner universities
apis.notes: Useful for upskilling recommendations. Can map skill gaps to relevant courses.

apis.name: edX Course Catalog
apis.free_tier: Free affiliate API with registration.
apis.data_provided: Course catalog, professional certificates, MicroMasters programs, skill tags
apis.notes: Similar to Coursera API. Good for training/upskilling recommendations.

apis.name: GitHub API (Developer Skills)
apis.free_tier: 60 requests/hour unauthenticated, 5,000/hour with token. Free.
apis.data_provided: Developer profiles, contribution data, language proficiency, project portfolios, trending technologies
apis.notes: Useful for tech recruiting. Can assess developer activity, language expertise, and open-source contributions.

apis.name: Stack Overflow / Stack Exchange API
apis.free_tier: 300 requests/day without key, 10,000/day with key. Free registration.
apis.data_provided: Technology trends, tag popularity, user expertise scores, trending questions by technology
apis.notes: Great for tracking technology adoption trends. Tag popularity data useful for skills demand analysis.

apis.name: IPEDS (Integrated Postsecondary Education Data)
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required. Urban Institute Education Data Portal.
apis.data_provided: College enrollment, graduation rates, degrees awarded by field, institutional characteristics, tuition data
apis.notes: NCES data via Urban Institute API. Useful for talent pipeline analysis -- how many graduates in specific fields by metro area.

apis.name: College Scorecard API
apis.free_tier: Fully free government API. API key required (free).
apis.data_provided: Institution data, graduation rates, post-graduation earnings, student demographics, program-level data
apis.notes: US Dept of Education API. Post-graduation earnings data by institution and field is highly valuable for salary benchmarking.

apis.name: FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data)
apis.free_tier: Free with API key registration. 120 requests/minute.
apis.data_provided: 800,000+ economic time series: GDP, unemployment, CPI, interest rates, JOLTS, housing, consumer confidence
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. Core economic data source. JOLTS data for labor market. Weekly refresh enabled.

apis.name: Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA)
apis.free_tier: Free with API key registration. Fair use rate limits.
apis.data_provided: GDP by state/metro, personal income, industry accounts, international trade, regional price parities
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. Regional GDP and income data useful for salary benchmarking by metro.

apis.name: World Bank Open Data
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required. REST + bulk download.
apis.data_provided: Global development indicators: GDP, labor force participation, education, unemployment, population, FDI across 200+ countries
apis.notes: Essential for international recruitment intelligence. 16,000+ indicators across all countries. No auth needed.

apis.name: IMF Data API
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required. JSON/XML responses.
apis.data_provided: International Financial Statistics, World Economic Outlook, Balance of Payments, labor market indicators by country
apis.notes: Good for macroeconomic context in international hiring. Complements World Bank data.

apis.name: OECD Data API
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required. SDMX REST API.
apis.data_provided: Labor force statistics, employment rates, earnings, education attainment, migration, hours worked across OECD countries
apis.notes: Best source for comparing labor markets across developed economies. Employment, wages, and productivity data across 38 OECD member countries.

apis.name: Eurostat API
apis.free_tier: Fully free EU API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: EU labor market statistics, earnings, job vacancies, migration, education, unemployment by region
apis.notes: Granular European labor market data. Useful for EU-specific recruitment intelligence. NUTS region breakdowns.

apis.name: Google Trends
apis.free_tier: No official API. Accessible via pytrends library or Tavily/Firecrawl.
apis.data_provided: Search interest over time, geographic distribution, related queries, trending topics by industry
apis.notes: Already integrated via hardcoded approach. Consider pytrends library for programmatic access.

apis.name: UN Data API
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Global population, labor force, migration, education statistics across all UN member states
apis.notes: Broadest international coverage. Good for emerging market hiring data.

apis.name: Trading Economics API
apis.free_tier: Free tier: 500 requests/month. Covers 196 countries.
apis.data_provided: Economic indicators, labor statistics, wages, unemployment rates, forecasts across countries
apis.notes: Good aggregator of global economic data. Free tier limited but sufficient for supplementary data.

apis.name: US Census Bureau API
apis.free_tier: Fully free government API. API key required (free registration).
apis.data_provided: ACS demographics, population, income, education, commuting, housing, industry employment by county/metro/state
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. ACS 5-year data for demographic profiling. 50+ metros covered.

apis.name: GeoNames
apis.free_tier: Free tier: 1,000 credits/hour per application. Registration required.
apis.data_provided: Geographic data, postal codes, city populations, timezone info, nearby cities, country subdivisions
apis.notes: Hardcoded 50 metros. Could expand to dynamic lookup for international cities.

apis.name: US Census Geocoder
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Address geocoding, FIPS codes, census tract/block lookups, coordinate-to-geography mapping
apis.notes: Useful for mapping client locations to census geographies for demographic data pulls.

apis.name: Data.gov CKAN API
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required. 300,000+ datasets.
apis.data_provided: Federal datasets catalog across all agencies: labor, health, education, immigration, housing
apis.notes: Meta-API for discovering other government datasets. Useful for finding niche data sources.

apis.name: Open Data Soft (Multiple Cities)
apis.free_tier: Free access to 30,000+ public datasets. No authentication for public data.
apis.data_provided: City-level demographics, business registrations, permits, economic indicators, transportation
apis.notes: Aggregates open data from cities worldwide. Useful for hyperlocal recruitment market analysis.

apis.name: OpenCorporates API
apis.free_tier: Free tier: limited requests. Covers 200M+ companies across 140+ jurisdictions.
apis.data_provided: Company registrations, officers, filing history, jurisdiction data, industry codes, incorporation dates
apis.notes: Largest open database of companies. Useful for verifying employer data and building company profiles.

apis.name: SEC EDGAR API
apis.free_tier: Fully free government API. 10 requests/second rate limit. No authentication.
apis.data_provided: SEC filings, company financials, 10-K/10-Q reports, insider trading, executive compensation
apis.notes: Executive compensation data from proxy statements. Revenue and employee count from 10-K filings. Useful for public company intel.

apis.name: Clearbit (free tier via HubSpot)
apis.free_tier: Limited free tier available through HubSpot integration. Company enrichment basics.
apis.data_provided: Company enrichment: industry, size, tech stack, social profiles, funding, location
apis.notes: HubSpot acquired Clearbit. Some company enrichment available free. Useful for employer profiling.

apis.name: Crunchbase (Basic/Free)
apis.free_tier: Free tier: limited to basic company search and profiles. API key required.
apis.data_provided: Startup funding rounds, investors, company profiles, industry categories, employee counts
apis.notes: Free tier is very limited. Better to use Tavily/Firecrawl to pull Crunchbase data on-demand for specific companies.

apis.name: PredictLeads (Company Signals)
apis.free_tier: Free tier: 100 API calls/month. No credit card required.
apis.data_provided: Job posting signals, technology adoption, product launches, expansion signals, hiring velocity
apis.notes: Hiring velocity and expansion signals are extremely valuable for recruitment intelligence. High priority despite limited free tier.

apis.name: Companies House (UK)
apis.free_tier: Fully free UK government API. API key required (free).
apis.data_provided: UK company registrations, directors, filing history, accounts, SIC codes
apis.notes: UK-specific. Free and well-documented. Useful for UK client employer verification.

apis.name: H-1B / LCA Disclosure Data
apis.free_tier: Fully free government data. Bulk CSV downloads updated quarterly.
apis.data_provided: H-1B applications, prevailing wages, employer sponsors, job titles, approval rates, worksite locations
apis.notes: Integrated in S18. Core data for visa intelligence tool. Updated quarterly by DOL.

apis.name: USCIS Case Status
apis.free_tier: Free case-by-case lookup. No bulk API officially available.
apis.data_provided: Individual visa case status, processing times by form type and service center
apis.notes: Limited utility without bulk access. Processing times useful for timeline estimates.

apis.name: OFLC PERM Data
apis.free_tier: Fully free government data. Bulk CSV downloads.
apis.data_provided: PERM labor certification data: employer, job title, prevailing wage, case status, processing times
apis.notes: PERM data complements H-1B data. Shows green card sponsorship patterns by employer. Same DOL source, different dataset.

apis.name: State Department Visa Bulletin (via Firecrawl)
apis.free_tier: Free public data. No API -- requires scraping via Firecrawl.
apis.data_provided: Visa bulletin dates, priority date movements, country-specific backlogs, employment-based category status
apis.notes: Monthly updates. Can scrape via Firecrawl. Critical for immigration timeline planning.

apis.name: Migration Policy Institute Data Hub
apis.free_tier: Free public data and interactive tools. No formal API.
apis.data_provided: Immigration statistics, immigrant workforce data, state-level immigration profiles, DACA data
apis.notes: Useful reference data. Would need Tavily/Firecrawl for data extraction.

apis.name: OEWS (Occupational Employment & Wage Statistics)
apis.free_tier: Free. Accessible via BLS API. Part of BLS integration.
apis.data_provided: Employment and wage estimates for 800+ occupations across all US metros and states
apis.notes: Already accessible via BLS API integration. Most granular occupation-level wage data available.

apis.name: Lightcast Open Skills (formerly Emsi/Burning Glass)
apis.free_tier: Open Skills taxonomy is free. Full API requires paid subscription.
apis.data_provided: Skills taxonomy with 30,000+ skills, skill-to-occupation mappings, skill clusters
apis.notes: The open skills library is free and excellent. Full Lightcast API is paid. Skills taxonomy alone is high-value for skills gap analysis.

apis.name: ILO (International Labour Organization) ILOSTAT
apis.free_tier: Fully free. SDMX REST API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Global labor statistics: employment, unemployment, wages, working conditions, child labor, gender gaps across 230+ countries
apis.notes: Best source for international labor market comparisons. SDMX format may need wrapper. Covers all countries.

apis.name: ETA (Employment & Training Administration)
apis.free_tier: Fully free government data. Multiple datasets and APIs.
apis.data_provided: Workforce development, apprenticeship data, unemployment insurance, trade adjustment, job corps
apis.notes: DOL workforce development data. Apprenticeship data useful for skilled trades recruitment.

apis.name: LinkedIn Economic Graph (reports only)
apis.free_tier: Free reports and data downloads. No API access.
apis.data_provided: Workforce trends, hiring rates, skills migration, industry transitions, gender insights
apis.notes: No API but published reports contain valuable data. Can index reports in knowledge base for Nova AI.

apis.name: Google Jobs API (via SerpApi)
apis.free_tier: SerpApi free tier: 100 searches/month. Google Jobs data.
apis.data_provided: Google Jobs aggregated listings, salary estimates, company ratings, job highlights, apply links
apis.notes: Google Jobs aggregates from many sources. 100 free searches/month may be sufficient for on-demand queries.

apis.name: BuiltWith (Free Lookup)
apis.free_tier: Free tier: limited lookups. Shows technology stack for any domain.
apis.data_provided: Website technology stacks, CMS, frameworks, analytics tools, hosting providers, tech adoption trends
apis.notes: Useful for tech recruiting -- know what stack a company uses before pitching candidates. Limited free tier.

apis.name: Wappalyzer (Free tier)
apis.free_tier: Free tier: 50 lookups/month. Identifies technologies on websites.
apis.data_provided: Technology identification: programming languages, frameworks, CMS, analytics, CDN, hosting
apis.notes: Alternative to BuiltWith. Useful for understanding employer tech stacks for targeted recruiting.

apis.name: npm Registry API
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Package popularity, download counts, dependency graphs, technology adoption trends
apis.notes: Track JavaScript/Node.js technology adoption trends. Download counts indicate demand for specific tech skills.

apis.name: PyPI (Python Package Index) API
apis.free_tier: Fully free. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Python package statistics, download counts, project metadata, technology trends
apis.notes: Track Python technology adoption. Useful for data science and ML role demand analysis.

apis.name: HackerNews API (Y Combinator)
apis.free_tier: Fully free Firebase-based API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Tech industry news, job postings (monthly Who's Hiring threads), startup hiring trends, technology discussions
apis.notes: Monthly 'Who is Hiring?' threads are goldmines for startup job data. Can extract company, role, tech stack, location, salary info.

apis.name: Federal Register API
apis.free_tier: Fully free government API. No authentication required.
apis.data_provided: Federal regulations, proposed rules, executive orders, agency notices affecting employment law
apis.notes: Track regulatory changes affecting hiring: EEOC rules, OFCCP compliance, DOL wage rules, immigration policy changes.

apis.name: OSHA Establishment Search
apis.free_tier: Free public data. API available for inspection data.
apis.data_provided: Workplace safety inspections, violations, injury/illness rates by employer and industry
apis.notes: Employer safety records. Useful for employer due diligence in manufacturing/industrial recruiting.

apis.name: EEOC Data
apis.free_tier: Free public data. Downloadable datasets.
apis.data_provided: Employment discrimination charges, industry breakdown, resolution data, demographic workforce data
apis.notes: Compliance intelligence. EEO-1 data useful for diversity recruiting benchmarks.

apis.name: SAM.gov Entity/Exclusions API
apis.free_tier: Free government API. API key required (free registration).
apis.data_provided: Government contractor registrations, entity information, exclusion records, federal contract opportunities
apis.notes: Useful for government contracting recruitment. Identifies active federal contractors and their registration status.

quick_wins.name: World Bank Open Data
quick_wins.reason: No auth required, comprehensive global data, REST API

quick_wins.name: ESCO
quick_wins.reason: No auth required, 13,890 skills taxonomy, REST API, multilingual

quick_wins.name: OFLC PERM Data
quick_wins.reason: Same DOL source as H-1B, CSV bulk download, complements existing integration

quick_wins.name: College Scorecard
quick_wins.reason: Free gov API, post-graduation earnings data invaluable for salary benchmarking

quick_wins.name: SEC EDGAR
quick_wins.reason: No auth required, executive compensation and company financials

quick_wins.name: HackerNews Who's Hiring
quick_wins.reason: No auth required, monthly startup job data with salary/tech stack info

recommended_integration_order: Phase 1 (Quick Wins -- No Auth): World Bank, ESCO, SEC EDGAR, HackerNews, OECD
Phase 2 (Free Registration): College Scorecard, OFLC PERM, Federal Register, Lightcast Open Skills
Phase 3 (Limited Free Tier): PredictLeads, The Muse, Stack Overflow, GitHub API
Phase 4 (Via Tavily/Firecrawl): Glassdoor, Levels.fyi, PayScale, LinkedIn Economic Graph, Visa Bulletin
Phase 5 (International): ILO ILOSTAT, Eurostat, IMF, UN Data, Arbeitnow, Companies House UK
